title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Nami, Luffy as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be a bit of a problem if you died right here of blood loss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't have you revealing my ugly side to everyone as soon as you leave!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stay still... it'll be over soon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is my ability as a user of the MEM MEM FRUIT*.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have a roll of film in their minds that records memories for them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So if you ever have a piece of your past that you want to forget about...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Paste the memory of a soldier getting hit by a stray bullet over the original bit and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fufufu... I'll just have to "Trim" out our nice little talk from just now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's both have a great time at the wedding ceremony tomorrow!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Call a soldier! Take her to the infirmary.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The blood is freaking me out! Get me outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey girl... so Mama told me to make you reveal where Lola is right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: by the end of tonight- FA.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So spit it out already- FA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heck no! I'd never sell out one of my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kay, time to bring out the torture devices-fa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No! Cut it out right now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then how about I shoot you with a bowgun once every 5 seconds? Just let me know when you change your mind.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you saying?! That escalated way too quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I don't wanna die! Stop it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Quit screwing around, you lumpy mass!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry, Nami!! I'll rip these arms off within the next 5 seconds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Noooo I don't want either option!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woah, hey! You're not allowed to enter castle grounds at the moment!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place is already chaos, it can't get much worse.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
